text:
16 PRs wandered into the garden today. 🌱

GPT Image and FLUX.2 Klein got sturdier routes, failover, and fewer blocked-endpoint surprises. Media uploads can now grow into public tag galleries. Model Monitor learned tokens/sec, so it can report speed instead of vibes.

Also: runnable upload docs, repaired links, fewer scrollbars, and SDK retries stopped being mysterious.

Everything is in the repo: github.com/pollinations/pollinations

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #buildinpublic #indiedev #generativeart #aiimages #developertools #openinfra #webdevelopment
